title: Glasswing International: Empowering Communities through Mental Health Care and Leveraging Technology for Lasting Impact
show_notes: Glasswing International is a NGO with a remarkable journey, having impacted more than 2.2 million lives through their education and health initiatives throughout Latin America and New York City. Co-founder and President Celina de Sola shares her insights on the organization’s evolution and growth to 600 employees, and their community-driven approach that led to the organization’s non-clinical model for mental health care. The podcast explores scalability, sustainability, and the role of technology and data in highlighting growth as well as the gaps, to enable organizations to achieve greater impact.
Tags: Latin America, Mental Health, United States
